zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Lothrop於1621年2月21日出生在英國英格蘭越可爾艾潔頓時，他的父親John Lothrop36歲，母親Hannah Howse26歲。他於1623年1月13日與Sarah Learned在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1707年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年86歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Lothrop于1621年2月21日出生在英国英格兰越可爾艾潔頓时，他的父亲John Lothrop36岁，母亲Hannah Howse26岁。他于1623年1月13日与Sarah Learned在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1707年在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼巴恩斯塔波巴恩斯塔波享年86岁。

nameMeanings.name: Lothrop
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lowthorpe in East Yorkshire, named with the Old Norse personal name Logi or Lági + thorp ‘outlying farmstead’.

History: In 1634 the name was brought to North America by the Rev. John Lathrop (born 1584 in Etton, Yorkshire, England), a Puritan preacher fleeing religious persecution. He arrived in Plymouth Colony and lived in Scituate, MA, until 1639, then moved to Barnstable, MA, where his Bible can still be seen.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Lothrop was born on 21 February 1621, in Edgerton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Lothrop, was 36 and his mother, Hannah Howse, was 26. He married Sarah Learned on 13 January 1623, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1707, in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 86.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Lothrop est né le 21 février 1621, à Edgerton, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Lothrop, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Hannah Howse, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Learned le 13 janvier 1623, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1707, à Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 86 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Lothrop am 21. Februar 1621 in Edgerton, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Lothrop 36 und seine Mutter Hannah Howse 26. Er hat am 13. Januar 1623 in England Sarah Learned geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb 1707 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lothrop è nato il il 21 febbraio 1621 nel Edgerton, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Lothrop, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Hannah Howse, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Learned il 13 gennaio 1623, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1707, nel Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 86 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Lothropが1621年2月21日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアエジャートンで生まれた時，父John Lothropは36歳，母Hannah Howseは26歳であった。1623年1月13日にイギリスでSarah Learnedと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1707年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーバーンスタブルバーンスタブルで86歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Lothrop(이)가 1621년 2월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 에저턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Lothrop(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Hannah Howse(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1623년 1월 13일 영국에서 Sarah Learned(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1707년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 바른스타블일 바른스타블일에서 86세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Lothrop nasceu em 21 de fevereiro de 1621, em Edgerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Lothrop, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Hannah Howse, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Learned em 13 de janeiro de 1623, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1707, em Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 86 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Lothrop родился 21 февраля 1621 г. в местности эджиртон, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Lothrop было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Hannah Howse, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Learned 13 января 1623 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер в 1707 г. в местности барнстабл, барнстабл, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 86 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Lothrop nació el 21 de febrero de 1621, en Edgerton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Lothrop, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Hannah Howse, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sarah Learned el 13 de enero de 1623, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1707, en Barnstable, Barnstable, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 86 años.
